The '''''Tyrant''''' was an [[Ton-Falk-class escort carrier|''Ton-Falk''-class escort carrier]] serving with the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]].

==History==
It attempted to [[Second attack on the Peregrine|capture]] the ''[[Compellor]]'' following the Empire's earlier [[First attack on the Peregrine|failed attempt]]. Despite having a large amount of [[TIE/IN interceptor/Legends|TIE interceptors]] and some [[Gamma-class ATR-6 assault transport]]s at her disposal, the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] fighters assigned to protect the ship managed to destroy its defenses as well as the ''Tyrant'' itself.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing vs. TIE Fighter: Balance of Power Campaigns]]'' {{1st}}
